reference: My husband has a back problem and has developed leg and knee pain. The knee and back pain have improved since rehabilitation. Now he is experiencing pain in the calf. A negative venous Doppler study was performed. An X-ray of the knee showed osteoarthritis with effusion. The back of his knee is bruised, and his heel is also bruised. What is going on?
text: My husband had a back problem and has developed lead in knee pain. The knee and back pain had improved since involuntary. Now, he was experiencing pain in the past. A negative unit stopper study was performed. An x-ray of the knee showed osteoarthritis with infusion. The back of his knee is bruised and his hair is also bruised. What is going on?
